titleStmt.title: SII 4.803: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 803. (A.R. No. 343 of 1892). ON THE EIGHTH STONE IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [. 1*] yatra nīlagiristatra
pe(ṁ)nnā cōttaravāhinī . yatra rāmēśvarō dēvastatra mukti¨rnna saṁ
śayaḥ [. 2*] rakṣāyai jagatāṁ bhūyāddayāḷu¨rdviradānanaḥ .
pāthakrīḍāvidhau yasya palvalaṁti payōdhayaḥ [. 3*] [kī¨rti¨rvīra]
nṛsiṁhvasya jṛṁbhamāṇā divāniśaṁ . bhuvi sa¨rvadvijā
kṣānkurutē sva[¨rga]jadṛmān [. 4*] svasti śrījayābhyudaya śā
livāhanaśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1429 di Agunēṭi prabha
va saṁvatsara māgha ba 14 sōmavārānanu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīranaraśiṁhvarā
yamahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu pṛthivīrājyaṁ sēstu(ṁ)
nnuṁḍagānu tatpādapadmārādhakuṁḍaina śrīmanmahāpradhāna sā
ḷuvati(ṁ)mmayyaṁgāru . peṁḍlisuṁkhālakuṁgā vēIṁcina dha(ṁ)
¨rmmaśāsanaṁ . śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīvīranaraśiṁhvarāyamahārāyalu pā
liṁci māku nāyaṁkramai cellēṭi guttirājyaṁlōnu(ṁ)nnu
Aṁduku cellēpennabhaḍi śīmalōnu(ṁ)nnu pū¨rvananu peṁ
ḍliṁḍlakunu peṁḍlisuṁkhālu gonaṁgānu Ā vīranarasiṁ
hvarāyamahārāyalaku buṇyaṁgānu nēmu pū[¨rvā]
nanu guttiśīmanu(ṁ)nnu pe(ṁ)nnabaḍi śīmanu(ṁ)nnu peṁḍliṁḍlakugā
nē peṁḍlisuṁkhālu śivarātripuṇyakālamaṁdu sa¨rva
mā(ṁ)nyaṁgānu viḍistimi . gāna yī dha¨rmmānaku yavvaru
vakramai yavvaru tappikoṁnnānu vāraṇāśilōpala mātṛ
pitṛvadha .
Digital edition of SII 4.803 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
